statements.query: MATCH (h:Human)-[:IDENTITY_OKTA]->(:OktaUser) MATCH (h)-[r:CAN_ASSUME_ROLE]->(:AWSRole) WITH DISTINCT r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r
statements.__comment__: Migration: drop deprecated Okta-sourced (:Human)-[:CAN_ASSUME_ROLE]->(:AWSRole) edges; scoped via the :IDENTITY_OKTA provenance marker so non-Okta producers of CAN_ASSUME_ROLE are left untouched. Must run before the IDENTITY_OKTA cleanup below

statements.query: MATCH (:Human)-[r:IDENTITY_OKTA]->(:OktaUser) WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r
statements.__comment__: Migration: drop deprecated (:Human)-[:IDENTITY_OKTA]->(:OktaUser) edges left over from pre-refactor graphs

statements.query: MATCH (:OktaUser)-[r:MEMBER_OF_OKTA_ROLE]->() WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r
statements.__comment__: Migration: drop deprecated (:OktaUser)-[:MEMBER_OF_OKTA_ROLE]->() edges, replaced by :HAS_ROLE to OktaUserRole

statements.query: MATCH (:OktaGroup)-[r:MEMBER_OF_OKTA_ROLE]->() WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r
statements.__comment__: Migration: drop deprecated (:OktaGroup)-[:MEMBER_OF_OKTA_ROLE]->() edges, replaced by :HAS_ROLE to OktaGroupRole

statements.query: MATCH (n:OktaAdministrationRole) WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE n
statements.__comment__: Migration: drop deprecated OktaAdministrationRole nodes, replaced by OktaUserRole/OktaGroupRole
